title: WorktreeContext
description: Context written into a new worktree's .claude/state/ by the WorktreeCreate hook

worktreePath.description: Absolute path to the worktree root

parentSessionId.description: Session ID of the parent session that created this worktree

parentProjectRoot.description: Absolute path to the parent project root

profile.description: Profile name inherited from the parent session

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the worktree was created
